segments.caption: The video opens with a hand placing a cardboard house cutout onto a green background, transitioning into a vibrant, animated title sequence featuring the text 'CARDBOARD WORLD' surrounded by colorful crafting tools and materials. The scene shifts to a miniature kitchen setup with a blue faucet, golden fixtures, and a wooden crate holding orange carrots, all set against a pink backdrop with star patterns. A hand then places a yellow plush toy into a pink dollhouse bed, followed by a blue screen displaying the rating 'CARDBOARD WORLD IS RATED 13 YEARS AND OLDER'. The crafting process begins with hands assembling a pink cardboard structure with white polka dots, adding a scalloped awning and a grid-patterned floor. The structure is expanded with additional cardboard pieces, including a small orange floor section and a pink grid-patterned platform. The hands then construct a small cardboard box with a hinged lid, which is later decorated with a glittery pink panel featuring a digital timer and a colorful display, resembling a miniature oven or appliance. The final product is a detailed, decorated cardboard kitchen appliance with a functional-looking interface.

segments.caption: The video begins with a close-up of a pink cardboard structure featuring a white grid-patterned floor and a star-patterned pink background, establishing a dollhouse-like setting. The Hand appears, assembling a small orange cardboard cabinet with yellow handles, which is then placed on the grid-patterned floor. The scene shifts to a blue background where the Hand attaches a yellow plastic knob to a small orange stick, likely for a faucet, and then applies glue to the cabinet’s handles. The Hand then places a dark marble-patterned cardboard countertop with a circular cutout onto the cabinet, completing a kitchen unit. Next, the Hand decorates a white plastic cap with a green marker, transforming it into a sink basin, and attaches a blue flexible plastic tube as a faucet. Small golden faucet knobs are added, and the sink is placed on the countertop. The Hand then uses a blue clay ball to create a decorative element, possibly a soap dispenser or a toy, which is placed beside the sink. Throughout, the setting alternates between the pink star-patterned background and the blue workspace, with the Hand consistently manipulating materials to build and decorate the miniature kitchen. The text 'Cardboard World' is visible in the bottom left corner throughout the video, indicating the brand or channel name.

segments.caption: The video begins with a close-up of a hand shaping a blue clay ball into a rectangular form on a vibrant yellow and pink background, then pressing it into a clear plastic mold to create a smooth, rounded top. The hand then adds two small, round, silver eyes to the blue clay object, transforming it into a cute, face-like figure. Next, the hand uses pliers to bend a thin golden wire into a spiral shape, which is then attached to the blue clay object as a decorative element. The scene shifts to a miniature kitchen setup on a pink star-patterned background, where the hand places a white plastic cap (resembling a sink basin) onto a dark blue marble-print countertop. A blue flexible faucet is attached to the cap, and golden faucet knobs are placed beside it. The hand then decorates a small green plastic cap with white polka dots and inserts a tiny green plant with orange berries into it, creating a miniature potted plant. This plant is placed on the countertop. The hand then cuts a small piece of wooden stick and glues it to a flat wooden strip, forming a miniature spatula or tool, which is then placed on the countertop. Throughout the video, the hand works meticulously, using tools like pliers, glue, and a craft knife, with the background alternating between solid blue and pink star-patterned surfaces. The text 'Cardboard World' is consistently displayed at the bottom of the screen in white font with a pink outline.

segments.caption: The video begins with a close-up of a white felt cloud being decorated with pink clay dots using a toothpick, set against a vibrant blue background. The scene transitions to a hand sketching a bear-shaped outline on white cardboard with an orange pencil, then cutting it out with a craft knife. The cut-out is painted bright pink with a brush, and a small pink paper heart is glued to the top as a face detail. This pink bear-shaped piece is then assembled into a dollhouse bed with a checkered mattress, placed on a grid-patterned floor. The hand then shapes a small yellow clay ball into a bear head, adding two small ears and a red clay bow on top. Using a blue pen, eyes are drawn, followed by a black marker for the nose and mouth, completing the bear’s face. The background shifts between blue and pink surfaces, with colorful pencils and small pink pig figurines visible in the periphery, adding playful context to the crafting process. The final bear face is shown in close-up, fully detailed and ready for use in the dollhouse setting.

segments.caption: The video begins with a close-up of a hand using a blue pen to draw on a yellow clay bear face, which is then detailed with a black marker for eyes, nose, and mouth. The hand then attaches a red clay bow to the bear’s head, completing its face. The bear is placed on a pink star-patterned background, where it is later positioned on a pink dollhouse bed with a white grid-patterned mattress. The hand assembles a pink bear-shaped cardboard headboard, attaching a pink paper heart to form a face, and places it on the bed. The scene transitions to the hand cutting a white cardboard bear shape with a craft knife on a blue background, then painting it orange. The painted bear-shaped cardboard is placed on a grid-patterned floor, filled with blue clay balls to resemble a ball pit. The hand then assembles a white cardboard box with red trim into a two-compartment structure, placing it on the pink star-patterned background. A yellow cloud mat is placed on the floor, and a cardboard sign with 'Bear' written in cursive, covered with pink paper, is displayed. The hand also assembles a white felt cloud with pink and green clay dots for a face, placing it on the bed. The background features colorful pencils, yellow doll figurines, and pink pig figurines, adding to the playful atmosphere. The video concludes with the completed bear-themed dollhouse setup, including the bed, ball pit, and decorative elements, all arranged on the grid-patterned floor with a scalloped awning above the bed.

segments.caption: The video begins with a close-up of a vibrant pink dollhouse kitchen, featuring a grid-patterned floor, an orange cardboard cabinet, a marble-print countertop with a white plastic sink basin, a blue flexible faucet, golden faucet knobs, a blue clay ball, a green plastic cap with polka dots holding a miniature plant with orange berries, and a wooden stick and strip assembly. The Hand enters the frame, holding a white rectangular cardboard piece, which is then folded and glued to a pink paper heart to form a bear-shaped structure. The Hand applies glue from a yellow bottle labeled 'BULAIEN' to attach a green scalloped awning to the top of the pink bear structure, followed by adding yellow circular clay dots and a white beaded trim around the base. The Hand then decorates the bear with a red clay bow and uses a blue pen and black marker to draw facial features on a yellow clay bear face. The completed bear face is placed on a golden glittery cardboard base, which is then cut with a craft knife to refine its shape. The Hand assembles a white cardboard box with red trim into a two-compartment structure, placing it on the pink star-patterned background. The video concludes with the Hand placing the finished bear-shaped structure into the dollhouse, next to a blue clay ball pit, and adding a cardboard sign with 'Bear' written in cursive, covered with pink paper, to the scene. The environment shifts from a yellow background to a blue background during the crafting process, and finally to the pink star-patterned background for the final display. The on-screen text 'Cardboard World' is consistently visible at the bottom of the frame throughout the video.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a hand assembling a pink cardboard drawer unit, applying glue to its base and attaching small red wheels to its underside. The hand then wraps the unit with pink foam, trimming excess with scissors to create a soft, textured finish. A white beaded trim is added along the bottom edge for decoration. The scene transitions to a vibrant, fully assembled dollhouse interior, showcasing a colorful kitchen with a marble-print countertop, a white plastic sink with a blue flexible faucet, golden knobs, and a potted plant with orange berries in a green polka-dotted cap. A blue clay ball with a golden spiral sits beside the sink, and a wooden stick and strip assembly rests nearby. The hand then constructs a storefront structure with a scalloped awning, placing it on a grid-patterned floor. The video continues with the hand crafting a rainbow TV with pom-pom knobs and a red power button, placing it on a pink glitter drawer unit. A cardboard sign with 'Bear' is displayed, and a yellow clay bear face with a red clay bow is shown. The hand assembles a bear-shaped headboard for a dollhouse bed, placing it on a yellow cloud mat. The final scene reveals the completed dollhouse, featuring a pink bed with a white grid-patterned mattress, an orange cabinet, a blue ball pit, and a glittery staircase. The background shifts from a blue workspace to a pink star-patterned backdrop, and the on-screen text 'Cardboard World' remains visible throughout, emphasizing the brand. The environment is bright and playful, with colorful pencils, yellow doll figurines, and pink pig figurines adding to the whimsical atmosphere.

segments.caption: The video opens with a vibrant, colorful miniature world crafted from cardboard and clay, set against a bright pink and purple backdrop with a scalloped awning. A human hand with light-colored nail polish and cute animal-themed nail art enters the frame, holding a green plastic tool resembling a hammer or mallet. The hand uses the tool to press into a block of red clay, shaping it into a rectangular base. Nearby, a small blue watering can and a U-shaped structure made of orange clay bricks are visible, suggesting a garden or construction theme. The hand then places a toy dump truck filled with colorful miniature items, including a blue book and a yellow box, onto the pink surface. The truck is tipped, dumping the contents onto the red clay base. Next, the hand inserts wooden sticks into the clay, creating vertical supports. The blue watering can is used to 'water' the sticks, and green clay vines with red berries are added, transforming the setup into a miniature garden with climbing plants. segments.caption: The video begins with a vibrant dollhouse scene featuring a blue cardboard pool with a yellow ladder, a pink chair, and a Hello Kitty figurine lounging beside it, set against a pink brick wall and green grass mat. The scene transitions to a crafting process where a hand with light-colored nail polish and cute animal-themed nail art assembles a pink cardboard bed with a white grid-patterned mattress, placing it on a grid-patterned floor. The hand then crafts a miniature drawer unit, applying pink tape to the edges and adding a blue heart-shaped sticker. Next, the hand decorates a white box with a rainbow-colored strip and white lace trim, placing it on a blue surface. The hand then assembles a pink drawer unit with yellow drawer fronts and golden knobs, placing it on a pink star-patterned background. The hand also crafts a rainbow TV with white pom-pom knobs and a red power button, placing it on the drawer unit. The hand then decorates a blue floral-patterned box with white lace trim and a yellow bow, placing it on the pink star-patterned background. The hand also crafts a green scalloped cardboard piece, placing it on the pink star-patterned background. The hand then crafts a white clay bunny with black marker-drawn eyes and mouth, placing it on the pink star-patterned background. The hand also crafts a yellow clay bear with a red clay bow and blue pen-drawn eyes, placing it on the pink star-patterned background. The hand then crafts a blue cardboard chair with a checkered seat and golden glittered edges, placing it in a dollhouse kitchen scene. The hand also crafts a pink cardboard piece with yellow glue, placing it on a blue surface. The hand then crafts a blue glittery slime, kneading and shaping it in a clear plastic container. The hand also crafts a white glue stick, applying it to a pink cardboard bow. The hand then places a clear jar with a rainbow label into a purple shelf. The hand also writes Korean text and draws decorative elements on a black cardboard box with a white marker. The hand then places a blue cardboard pool with a textured surface to mimic water on a yellow base. The hand also crafts a brown cardboard base, covering it with pink and white patterned paper and adding a brick-patterned cardboard piece. The hand then places a yellow cardboard box with green plastic foliage and painted flowers on a white base. The hand also cuts a pink felt piece into a curved shape with scissors. The hand then places two yellow chick figurines and a white chicken figurine on a green felt grass mat, interacting with a white plastic tray filled with colorful beads. The hand also places a Hello Kitty figurine into the pool and later moves it to lounge on the pink chair. The on-screen text 'Cardboard World' is consistently displayed at the bottom of the frame throughout the video.

segments.caption: The video segment begins with a close-up of a pink cardboard structure being assembled, revealing a miniature bedroom scene with a bed and drawers. The Hand carefully places a yellow cardboard piece with a wavy edge onto white cylindrical legs, forming a small table. This table is then positioned beside the bed, which features a rainbow-colored blanket and a yellow doll figurine. Next, the Hand constructs a miniature computer setup: a black cardboard box is decorated with holographic stickers to resemble a PC tower, then placed under the table. A white cardboard piece is painted black and then decorated with a printed Windows-style desktop interface to simulate a monitor, which is mounted on a white stand and placed on the table. A small black keyboard is added in front of the monitor. The Hand then assembles a white plastic flower-shaped object with a blue center, likely a decorative lamp or fan, and places it beside the desk. Throughout the segment, the background remains vibrant with pink and purple walls, and the on-screen text 'Cardboard World' is consistently displayed at the bottom. The lighting is bright and even, emphasizing the colorful, playful aesthetic of the miniature dollhouse environment.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a hand placing a blue flower-shaped object onto a white stand, set against a vibrant pink background with heart patterns. The scene transitions to a colorful dollhouse bedroom, where a Hello Kitty figurine is placed on a pink chair beside a desk with a computer setup, including a monitor, keyboard, and PC tower. The hand then places a small blue and white bunny figurine on a pedestal, and the camera pans to reveal a rainbow-colored bed and a glittery staircase leading to a lower level with yellow chick figurines and a tray of colorful beads. The scene shifts to a crafting area with a blue and yellow surface, where the hand assembles a miniature kitchen unit from cardboard, applying glue and decorating it with purple glitter, a black front panel, and a white marble-patterned countertop. The hand adds a black stovetop with a white circular design and a pink blender, then places a green pot with orange berries on the counter. The final shot shows the completed kitchen unit being placed into the dollhouse, integrating seamlessly with the existing bedroom scene. Throughout, the on-screen text 'Cardboard World' remains visible at the bottom of the frame, indicating the channel or brand name.

segments.caption: The video opens with a vibrant, miniature kitchen scene dominated by pink and purple hues, featuring a dollhouse-style setup with heart-patterned walls and a colorful countertop. A human hand with light-colored nail polish and cute animal-themed nail art enters the frame, placing a pink, glittery, rectangular object resembling a cake or dessert on a rainbow-colored, pleated paper base. The hand then decorates a small white cylindrical object with yellow and orange flower stickers, placing it beside the pink item. The scene shifts to a close-up of the rainbow base, now serving as a stand for a miniature cooking activity. The hand uses a tiny spoon to scoop a white, powdery substance—likely flour or sugar—onto an orange square platform atop the rainbow base. The substance is then mixed with a clear liquid, forming a dough-like consistency, which is shaped into a ball and topped with a yellow clay piece to resemble a boiled egg. The hand uses tweezers to place the egg into a miniature oven, then removes it and places it on a small plate. The scene transitions to a black frying pan on a stove, where the hand uses tweezers to add a red, circular object—possibly a meat patty—into the pan, simulating cooking. Throughout, the on-screen text 'Cardboard World' remains visible at the bottom, indicating the brand or channel. The environment is bright and playful, with glittery surfaces and pastel colors enhancing the whimsical, craft-focused atmosphere.

segments.caption: The video begins with a close-up of a miniature pink and purple glittery oven, where a yellow clay egg is placed on a white plate inside. The Hand opens the oven door, revealing the egg, then removes it and places it on an orange square platform atop a rainbow pleated base. The Hand uses a tiny spoon to mix a white powdery substance with a clear liquid on the platform, forming a dough-like mixture. The scene transitions to the Hand placing a red clay patty into a small silver frying pan, simulating cooking. Next, the Hand assembles a miniature hamburger by stacking layers of yellow, green, and red clay pieces on a brown cardboard base, then places it on a white plate. The Hand then applies yellow glue from a bottle labeled 'ZHANLUI' onto a brown cardboard piece, which is then covered with pink paper. The Hand adds pink glittery squares to the pink cardboard, followed by blue and black strips, and a small sticker of a cat holding a hamburger. The Hand then folds a purple paper strip over a yellow surface, preparing it for the next step. Throughout, the background shifts between a vibrant pink star-patterned backdrop and a solid blue surface, with the on-screen text 'Cardboard World' consistently displayed at the bottom. The lighting remains bright and colorful, emphasizing the playful, craft-focused atmosphere.

segments.caption: The video opens with a vibrant crafting scene where a hand with light-colored nail polish and animal-themed nail art is seen cutting a purple cardboard strip with a craft knife, setting the stage for a colorful miniature world. The scene transitions to a fully assembled dollhouse, showcasing a whimsical bedroom with a rainbow bed, a pink and purple wardrobe, and a desk with a computer setup. The Hand places a Hello Kitty figurine on a rainbow pleated base, then uses a tiny spoon to simulate cooking by mixing a white powder and clear liquid on an orange platform. The scene shifts to a kitchen area with a glittery pink oven, where a yellow clay egg is placed on a white plate. The Hand then moves the egg to a frying pan, simulating cooking. The camera pans to reveal a broader dollhouse scene with a blue swimming pool, a pink chair, and a garden with a white chicken and yellow chicks pecking at colorful beads on a green felt grass mat. A real hamster briefly appears, exploring the bed before the Hand places the Hello Kitty figurine into the pool. The video concludes with a wide shot of the entire dollhouse, highlighting the intricate details, including a brick-patterned wall, a miniature garden with a yellow box planter, and a blue bird perched on a window ledge. The on-screen text 'Cardboard World' remains consistently displayed at the bottom, reinforcing the brand identity. segments.caption: The video opens with a vibrant, fully assembled miniature dollhouse scene, showcasing a colorful and whimsical environment. The camera pans across a detailed setup featuring a pink and purple kitchen with a glittery staircase, a bedroom with a rainbow bed, and an outdoor garden area with a green felt grass mat. Yellow chick figurines and a white chicken figurine are seen interacting with a white plastic tray filled with colorful beads, simulating a farmyard scene. A Hello Kitty figurine is placed into a blue cardboard pool, then moved to lounge on a pink chair beside the pool. The scene includes a miniature computer setup with a black cardboard PC tower, white monitor, and keyboard, all placed on a yellow cardboard table with white cylindrical legs. The kitchen area features a stove with a frying pan containing a red clay patty and a yellow clay egg, suggesting a cooking activity. A real hamster briefly appears, exploring the rainbow bed before moving out of frame. The entire scene is set against a bright blue background, with the on-screen text 'Cardboard World' consistently displayed at the bottom. The video then transitions to a blurred, colorful abstract view before fading to black, indicating the end of the segment.
